title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at National Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at National Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
